tool_progress.label: Vision Review • Review video against a claim

summary_trace.summary: This is a dark-themed chat interface featuring white text messages and circular user avatars. A small notification bar at the bottom includes a text input field and a send icon, while various icons and menu options are visible at the top.

This frame shows a dark-themed chat interface with white and gray text bubbles containing messages. A small modal window is centered, displaying text about a "Render Visual" process and a dialogue from "scringlo scrambler."

This frame shows a dark-themed chat interface containing text messages and system-style status updates. The text includes user names like "scringlo scrambler" and "User," dialogue discussing "lissajous wobble loops," and status notifications for "Render Visual" and "s

This image displays a dark-themed chat interface with white and pink text containing various messages. A pink rectangular modal is overlaid in the center, containing light-colored text and a small white circular icon.

A large rectangular canvas displays a mosaic of irregular, scattered geometric shapes in various colors including green, purple, tan, blue, and magenta. Below the canvas, a text input field is visible at the bottom of a user interface.

FAIL: While the text in the chat mentions "lissajous wobble loops," the visual evidence only shows a chat interface and a canvas of irregular, scattered geometric shapes; it does not show an actual Lissajou
